Package org.eventb.internal.core.preferences

Class PreferenceUtils

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.preferences.PreferenceUtils
public class PreferenceUtils extends Object
Utility class for preferences using.

  • Field Details

    • DEBUG

      public static boolean DEBUG
      The debug flag. This is set by the option when the platform is launched. Client should not try to reset this flag.

  • Constructor Details

    • PreferenceUtils

      public PreferenceUtils()

  • Method Details

    • flatten

      public static <T> String flatten(List<T> objects, String separator)
      Returns a string representation of a list of input objects. The objects are separated by a given character.
      Parameters:
      objects - a list of objects
      separator - the character to use to separate the objects
      Returns:
      the string representation of input objects

    • parseString

      public static String[] parseString(String stringList, String c)
      Parse a character separated string to a list of string.
      Parameters:
      stringList - the comma separated string.
      c - the character separates the string
      Returns:
      an array of strings that make up the character separated input string.

    • loopOnAllPending

      public static ITacticDescriptor loopOnAllPending(List<ITacticDescriptor> descs, String id)

    • loopOnAllPending

      public static ITacticDescriptor loopOnAllPending(String[] tacticIDs, String id)
      Returns a 'loop on all pending' tactic descriptor on auto tactics with given ids; the resulting tactic ears the given id.
      Parameters:
      tacticIDs - an array of auto tactic ids
      id - the id of the resulting tactic
      Returns:
      a tactic descriptor

    • getDocument

      public static Document getDocument() throws ParserConfigurationException
      Returns a Document that can be used to build a DOM tree
      Returns:
      the Document
      Throws:
      ParserConfigurationException - if an exception occurs creating the document builder

    • makeDocument

      public static Document makeDocument(String str) throws ParserConfigurationException, SAXException, IOException
      Makes a DOM document from the given string.
      Parameters:
      str - xml content
      Returns:
      a document
      Throws:
      ParserConfigurationException
      SAXException
      IOException

    • serializeDocument

      public static String serializeDocument(Document doc) throws TransformerException, IOException
      Serializes a XML document into a string - encoded in UTF8 format, with platform line separators.
      Parameters:
      doc - document to serialize
      Returns:
      the document as a string
      Throws:
      TransformerException - if an unrecoverable error occurs during the serialization
      IOException - if the encoding attempted to be used is not supported

    • getUniqueChild

      public static Node getUniqueChild(Node node)

    • getSimplifyProofPref

      public static boolean getSimplifyProofPref()

    • init

      public static void init()
      Initialize auto/post tactic manager from stored preferences; add listeners for preference updating and restoring.

    • flush

      public static void flush()
      Flush the preferences to the persistent store. It should at least be called when Rodin is shutdown to persist preferences.

    • recoverOldPreference

      public static CachedPreferenceMap<ITacticDescriptor> recoverOldPreference(String oldPref)
      Recovers a preference stored using old format into a preference map using new format.
      Parameters:
      oldPref - a serialized preference
      Returns:
      a new preference map, or null if recover failed.
      Since:
      2.3

    • restoreFromUIIfNeeded

      public static void restoreFromUIIfNeeded(org.eclipse.core.runtime.preferences.IEclipsePreferences prefNode, boolean force)
      Restores UI preferences into the given (core) preference node.
      Parameters:
      prefNode - a preference node
      force - true to force restoration and preference synchronization, false otherwise
